assertions.description: Boot with no .env at the repo root fails immediately, naming the missing item, with no compose invocation
assertions.expected: non-zero exit, clear message, instant return
assertions.observed: 'preflight failed: .env not found at the repo root — copy .env.example and set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'; EXIT_CODE=1; returned in seconds; no compose output

assertions.description: Boot with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY emptied in .env fails immediately, naming the key
assertions.observed: 'preflight failed: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is missing or empty in .env'; EXIT_CODE=1; no compose invocation

assertions.description: A non-serving state with --timeout-seconds 15 fails at the cap with diagnostics instead of hanging
assertions.expected: 'Boot failed (timeout)' at ~15s, diagnostics block (compose ps + log tail), non-zero exit
assertions.observed: 'Boot failed (timeout): /health did not return 200 within 15s (last: GET /health failed: fetch failed)' followed by '--- diagnostics: docker compose ps ---' and the 100-line archie log tail; EXIT_CODE=1

knowledge_log: preflight failed: .env not found at the repo root — copy .env.example and set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
preflight failed: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is missing or empty in .env
Booting archie via `docker compose up --build -d` (target http://localhost:3000) ...
Boot failed (timeout): /health did not return 200 within 15s (last: GET /health failed: fetch failed)
